$comment: Single source of truth for the OPC UA MCP tool surface shared by both servers. The Node server builds its tools/list response directly from this file (copied into build/ at build time). The Python (FastMCP) server reads tool descriptions and the capability node IDs from it; its signature-derived input schemas are checked against this file by tests/test_contract_parity.py. To add or change a tool: edit this file, then update each server's per-tool logic (Node: a case in the CallTool switch; Python: the @mcp.tool function), and add an E2E test.

tools.name: read_opcua_node
tools.description: Read the value of a specific OPC UA node

node_id.description: The OPC UA node ID in the format 'ns=<namespace>;i=<identifier>'. Example: 'ns=2;i=2'.

tools.name: write_opcua_node
tools.description: Write a value to a specific OPC UA node

node_id.description: The OPC UA node ID in the format 'ns=<namespace>;i=<identifier>'. Example: 'ns=2;i=3'.

value.description: The value to write to the node. Will be converted based on node type.

tools.name: browse_opcua_node_children
tools.description: Browse the children of a specific OPC UA node

node_id.description: The OPC UA node ID to browse (e.g., 'ns=0;i=85' for Objects folder).

tools.name: read_multiple_opcua_nodes
tools.description: Read the values of multiple OPC UA nodes in a single request

node_ids.description: A list of OPC UA node IDs to read (e.g., ['ns=2;i=2', 'ns=2;i=3']).

tools.name: write_multiple_opcua_nodes
tools.description: Write values to multiple OPC UA nodes in a single request

nodes_to_write.description: A list of objects containing 'node_id' and 'value'. Example: [{'node_id': 'ns=2;i=2', 'value': '10.5'}, {'node_id': 'ns=2;i=3', 'value': 'active'}]

tools.name: call_opcua_method
tools.description: Call a method on a specific OPC UA object node

object_node_id.description: The OPC UA node ID of the object that contains the method. Example: 'ns=2;i=1' for the Methods folder.

method_node_id.description: The OPC UA node ID of the method to call. Example: 'ns=2;i=2' for StartProduction method.

arguments.description: List of arguments to pass to the method. Arguments will be converted to appropriate OPC UA variants.

tools.name: get_all_variables
tools.description: Get all available variables from the OPC UA server, excluding those under the built-in 'Server' object

tools.name: read_history_opcua_node
tools.description: Read the historical values of a specific OPC UA node

node_id.description: The OPC UA node ID in the format 'ns=<namespace>;i=<identifier>'. Example: 'ns=2;i=2'.

num_values.description: Number of values to read (default: unlimited)

tools.name: read_aggregate_opcua_node
tools.description: Calculate the historical aggregates over a defined time range, divided into smaller chunks defined by the `processing_interval` (in milliseconds). The server divides the [`start_time`, `end_time`] domain into these intervals, returning one aggregated value per interval

node_id.description: The OPC UA node ID in the format 'ns=<namespace>;i=<identifier>'. Example: 'ns=2;i=2'.

processing_interval.description: The duration (ms) for each computed value. If set to 0, the server calculates a single aggregate value for the entire range.
